_comment: Full-Featured GitHub Issue Example - Complete configuration with all sections
_description: This example demonstrates all supported label types and body sections for maximum control over task execution.
title: Design and implement payment gateway integration
body:
## Context

This task is part of the e-commerce milestone (M001). We need to integrate a payment gateway to process customer transactions securely. The current checkout flow ends without payment processing.

## Goal

Design and implement a secure payment gateway integration supporting Stripe and PayPal with proper error handling and transaction logging.

## Constraints

- Must comply with PCI DSS Level 1 requirements
- Maximum transaction timeout: 30 seconds
- Support USD, EUR, and GBP currencies
- Idempotent transaction requests

## Inputs

- design-note: `specs/001/design-note.md` - Architecture design for payment flow
- api-keys: `config/stripe-test.keys` - Stripe test environment credentials
- mock-data: `tests/fixtures/transactions.json` - Sample transaction data for testing

## Expected Outputs

- payment-service: implementation-summary - Payment service implementation
- unit-tests: verification-report - Unit test coverage report
- integration-guide: docs-sync-report - Integration documentation
- security-review: security-review-report - Security assessment report

labels._comment: Role label: determines which expert role handles this task
labels.name: role:developer
labels.description: Assigns to developer role for implementation

labels._comment: Milestone label: links task to project milestone
labels.name: milestone:M001
labels.description: Part of milestone M001 - E-commerce Core Features

labels._comment: Command label: specific skill/command to invoke
labels.name: command:feature-implementation

labels._comment: Risk label: indicates task risk level (affects retry strategy)
labels.name: risk:high
labels.description: High-risk task due to security requirements

milestone._comment: GitHub milestone can also be used if no milestone: label present
milestone.title: M001 - E-commerce Core Features

_label_priority_rules._comment: When multiple labels of same type exist, priority order is applied
_label_priority_rules.role_priority: architect > developer > tester > reviewer > docs > security
_label_priority_rules.example: If both role:developer and role:tester exist, architect is used (if present), otherwise developer
